name: Amphora Diner Deluxe

notes: Every one of the 100 frozen rows was reconciled against the current restaurant-issued 33-page menu and the exact-address restaurant-linked FastOrder catalog for 1151 Elden Street in Herndon.
Sixteen frozen rows were headings, modifier instructions, description fragments, a photo caption, a shared service rule, or a restaurant promo card rather than menu formulations.
The other 84 frozen rows correspond to 83 current formulations; one collision was a duplicate Lavazza presentation. The frozen record omitted 217 current formulations.

The corrected catalog contains 300 current formulations represented by 320 retained source presentations across 28 categories. Shakes and Sundaes, Breakfast Beverages, and Beverages are placed after food and bakery categories.

The restaurant-linked FastOrder catalog contributed 296 live presentations, including six sold-out and 174 configurable presentations. Twenty-four real formulations appearing only in the current restaurant PDF were retained as current even though they are not orderable online.

The current restaurant PDF is a full menu, not an allergen matrix. Positive allergens are labeled official-ingredients only when the restaurant-issued formulation text directly names the ingredient or allergen.
The corrected catalog has 174 official-ingredients rows and 126 officially unavailable rows. It makes no item-level may-contain, shared-equipment, or negative safety claims.
The repeated raw-or-undercooked-food advisory was not promoted to item allergens or cross-contact. Optional configurator choices were excluded from fixed-formulation allergens.
Among the 84 real frozen formulations, 45 frozen source/allergen records were wrong and 39 matched the reviewed current semantics; the 16 artifact rows were not applicable.
The frozen extraction over-read PDF headings, option labels, adjacent descriptions, photo text, and the repeated raw-food advisory while omitting most of the live operational catalog.

The reviewed parser preserves all 296 FastOrder presentations, vendor IDs, option groups, configurability, stock state, prices, descriptions, and categories before consolidating exact duplicate presentations and three naming aliases by formulation.

Current restaurant-PDF evidence is merged by formulation, and historical 2023 and 2021 PDFs are retained only as source history. Linked-vendor descriptions remain restaurant-linked-vendor evidence and are never promoted to restaurant-issued allergen claims.

Twenty focused catalog and reconciliation tests pass. Two identical target-only repair runs produced target SHA-256 7a955b56b5cbadf45436c195c0d0acd045fa3b12a57b224e22d361a8e6761f68 and preserved all 1,494 non-target records at SHA-256 da9676bce67985ea47fa0a4485d524521498a364aefbd586ed0485eb95ded243.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current Amphora Diner Deluxe page, confirmed the Herndon identity and address, and followed its current menu and ordering links.
Captured the 1,949,427-byte current restaurant PDF, extracted all 33 pages, and visually reviewed every page for menu boundaries, formulation text, and source semantics.
notes: The PDF is a current menu and contains no complete allergen matrix or item-level cross-contact disclosure.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the exact-address restaurant-linked catalog and parsed 27 source categories, 296 live presentations, six sold-out presentations, and every available option group and vendor ID.
notes: FastOrder is current restaurant-linked-vendor menu evidence, not restaurant-issued allergen authority.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the hidden 2023 PDF and the linked 2021 takeout PDF, compared them with the current surfaces, and retained them only as source history.

Reviewed the current official site, current full-menu PDF, exact-address linked ordering catalog, historical restaurant PDFs, and targeted results; no current restaurant-issued allergen matrix or item-level cross-contact disclosure was found.
notes: Only direct positive restaurant-issued formulation terms were retained as official ingredient evidence.

findings.summary: The frozen 100-row record omitted 217 current formulations and did not represent the live exact-address ordering catalog.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 300 current formulations from all 320 retained presentations and preserved both orderable and current restaurant-PDF-only formulations.

findings.summary: Sixteen frozen rows were section headings, option instructions, description fragments, a photo caption, a shared rule, or a promotional card.
findings.resolution: Quarantined all 16 non-formulation rows and added focused tests for the exact artifact classes.

findings.summary: The frozen PDF path promoted adjacent text and the repeated raw-food advisory into item allergens; 45 of 84 real frozen formulations had wrong source or allergen semantics.
findings.resolution: Limited official claims to direct positive restaurant-issued formulation terms, removed invented may-contain claims, and left unsupported rows officially unavailable.

findings.summary: The frozen path confused configurable toppings, substitutions, and shared service rules with fixed formulations.
findings.resolution: Preserved configurator option groups as option provenance while excluding optional choices from fixed-formulation ingredients and allergens.

findings.summary: The live catalog contains 17 exact normalized duplicate groups plus three clear naming aliases across menu surfaces.
findings.resolution: Consolidated presentations by canonical formulation without discarding prices, categories, vendor IDs, stock state, or source provenance.

findings.summary: Older 2023 and 2021 restaurant PDFs remain accessible and could be mistaken for the current operating menu.
findings.resolution: Marked both older PDFs as history and used the current 2025 PDF plus current exact-address ordering catalog for the repaired record.

repairs.summary: Removed 16 artifacts, restored 217 omitted formulations, consolidated 320 presentations into 300 current formulations, preserved configurable option provenance, corrected 45 frozen source/allergen mismatches, and enforced restaurant-issued versus linked-vendor authority boundaries.

notes: Current identity: Amphora’s Diner Deluxe, 1151 Elden St, Herndon, VA 20170.
